Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

units = ['แห้ง', 'แล้ง']
n = len\(units\)

for start in range\(n\):
    cands = ws._generate_candidates_from_units\(units, start\)
    print\(f'Candidates at pos {start}: {[c for c,_ in cands]}'\)
    for cand, length in cands:
        s = ws._score_candidate_v2\(cand, length, start, n, None, units[start+1:]\)
        freq = ws._get_word_frequency\(cand\)
        print\(f'  {repr\(cand\):20} unit_len={length}  freq={freq:.2f}  score={s:.3f}  in_dict={ws.dictionary.contains\(cand\)}'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

tests = [
    \(['แห้ง', 'แล้ง'],               'แห้งแล้ง'\),
    \(['ล้ำ', 'ค่า'],                 'ล้ำค่า'\),
    \(['อย่าง', 'มาก'],               'อย่างมาก'\),
    \(['ภัย', 'ธรรม', 'ชา', 'ติ'],    'ภัย|ธรรมชาติ'\),
    \(['และ', 'ประ', 'เทศ'],          'และ|ประเทศ'\),
    \(['มาก', 'สุด'],                  'มากสุด or มาก|สุด'\),
]
for mtus, expected in tests:
    result = ws.segment_with_viterbi\(mtus\)
    print\(f'{"  |  ".join\(mtus\):30} -> {"  |  ".join\(result\):25}  \(expected: {expected}\)'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

tests = [
    \(['แห้ง', 'แล้ง'],               'แห้งแล้ง'\),
    \(['ล้ำ', 'ค่า'],                 'ล้ำค่า'\),
    \(['อย่าง', 'มาก'],               'อย่างมาก'\),
    \(['ภัย', 'ธรรม', 'ชา', 'ติ'],   'ภัย|ธรรมชาติ'\),
    \(['และ', 'ประ', 'เทศ'],          'และ|ประเทศ'\),
    \(['ของ', 'การ'],                  'ของ|การ'\),
    \(['ความ', 'เสี่ยง'],             'ความเสี่ยง'\),
]
for mtus, expected in tests:
    result = ws.segment_with_viterbi\(mtus\)
    ok = '✓' if '|'.join\(result\) == expected or len\(result\) < len\(mtus\) and expected.count\('|'\) < len\(mtus\)-1 else ''
    print\(f'{"  |  ".join\(mtus\):30} -> {"  |  ".join\(result\):25}  \(expected: {expected}\)'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

# Trace scores at current settings
words_to_check = ['แห้ง', 'แล้ง', 'แห้งแล้ง', 'ของ', 'การ', 'ของการ',
                  'ความ', 'เสี่ยง', 'ความเสี่ยง', 'ภัยธรรมชาติ', 'ภัย', 'ธรรมชาติ']
print\("Word frequencies:"\)
for w in words_to_check:
    freq = ws._get_word_frequency\(w\)
    score = freq * 0.3 + 2.0
    print\(f"  {w:15} freq={freq:.2f}  word_score={score:.2f}  in_dict={ws.dictionary.contains\(w\)}"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)
from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)
for w in ['ล้ำ', 'ค่า', 'ล้ำค่า']:
    freq = ws._get_word_frequency\(w\)
    print\(f"{w}: freq={freq:.2f}  score={freq*0.3+2.0:.2f}  in_dict={ws.dictionary.contains\(w\)}"\)
# With C=4.0: compound wins when score_c > score_1 + score_2 - 4.0
EOF)
